mapper.insert: insert into question (que_num, tet_num, que_seq, que_text, que_opt1, que_opt2, que_opt3, que_opt4, que_answer, que_desc, que_point) values (#{queNum}, #{tetNum}, #{queSeq}, #{queText}, #{queOpt1}, #{queOpt2}, #{queOpt3}, #{queOpt4}, #{queAnswer}, #{queDesc}, #{quePoint})
mapper.select: select * from question where tet_num = #{tet_num} order by que_num
mapper.update: update question set que_text = #{queText}, que_opt1 = #{queOpt1}, que_opt2 = #{queOpt2}, que_opt3 = #{queOpt3}, que_opt4 = #{queOpt4}, que_answer = #{queAnswer}, que_desc = #{queDesc} where que_num = #{queNum}
